title: Show HN: Only 1 of 4,356 reachable MCP servers is ready for the 2026-07-28 spec
content: Only one of 4,356 reachable MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers currently complies with the 2026-07-28 specification version, as revealed in a Hacker News "Show HN" post. This indicates extremely low adoption of the latest standard across available servers. The assessment covered publicly accessible servers measuring their readiness against the upcoming July 2026 protocol requirements.

title: 各位大佬每月在 AI 工具上的支出都是多少？多少是因为工作支出？
content: A Chinese developer spends 40-90 yuan monthly on AI coding tools, including OpenRouter, Longcat, and Xiaomi Mimo, primarily for programming work. They find AI speeds up initial writing but requires careful review and struggles with style consistency. With growing work demands including text processing tasks, their current token allowances are insufficient. They ask others about monthly spending, recommended 100-400 yuan tool options (especially concerning regional restrictions for services like Gemini), and appropriate personal work expense allocation.

title: LLM 知识库，如何统一本地与云端修改
content: NoteDeep's architecture synchronizes local and cloud edits for LLM knowledge bases by establishing separate sources of truth: local Markdown files and manifest.json for offline work, and ShareDB documents for cloud collaboration. Three input types—local rich-text editor, external AI tools modifying Markdown directly, and cloud editors—converge through a unified LocalDocState using JSON0 operations. The sync engine stages changes locally before networking, enabling offline editing without blocking. Page trees sync separately from content. Trade-offs include block-level rather than character-level diffs, no manual conflict resolution UI, and growing operation logs needing future compression.

title: 如何看待中华人民共和国外交部发布关于有关国家炒作「南海仲裁案裁决」出台十年的声明？释放了哪些信号？
content: China's Foreign Ministry condemned a joint statement by 14 countries marking the tenth anniversary of the South China Sea arbitration ruling. It reaffirmed China's territorial sovereignty over the South China Sea islands and adjacent waters, historical rights, and the ruling's illegality, calling it a "worthless piece of paper" that violates international law. China rejected the ruling and any actions based on it, criticizing US military deployment as the main regional challenge. It urged relevant countries to cease provocations and honor China's sovereignty.

title: 为啥越来越多的公司发现AI不能替代人工？
content: Companies that rushed to replace workers with AI are now reversing course. Surveys show 55% of executives who cut staff for AI regret it, while Ford rehired engineers and Australia's Commonwealth Bank restored human客服 after AI systems failed. AI requires ongoing human oversight, data refinement, and error correction to function; without the institutional knowledge of experienced staff, output accuracy degrades. AI struggles with nuanced judgment, empathy, and non-standard scenarios that define competitive advantage. Rising API, computing, and maintenance costs often exceed savings from eliminating mid-level employees. The optimal role for AI is augmenting human workers rather than replacing them.

title: GT AI Gateway 支持本地 Agent 配置了
content: GT AI Gateway adds local client management, allowing centralized configuration of Claude Codex and other clients directly through the gateway instead of manual local setup. It automatically handles protocol conversion between formats like Anthropic and OpenAI. The update also adds proxy support for providers and code optimizations. GT AI Gateway is a lightweight AI API gateway for aggregating and managing multiple LLM APIs with features including request analysis, protocol conversion, user authentication, full logging, and multiple deployment modes.

title: “背后空无一人”的LV，这次中国人彻底不买账了
content: LV faces backlash in China after suing milk-tea chain Molly Tea for $1.03 million over a four-leaf clover design. Chinese consumers discovered LV's iconic monogram derives from traditional Chinese patterns like the Sui-Tang baoxiang flower, fueling accusations of cultural appropriation. Meanwhile, LV's aggressive litigation—1,691 trademark cases in five years—coincides with declining sales: 2025 revenue fell 5%, profits dropped 13%, with its worst quarter in 30 years triggered by China. Young Chinese reject price hikes, preferring affordable domestic brands. Expanding stores to third-tier cities eroded the scarcity middle-class buyers valued. Competitors like Celine and Miu Miu captured fleeing customers with fresher designs.

title: 阿里急转向，快递大变局
content: Alibaba is strategically retreating from its logistics investments while consolidating control over core e-commerce operations. The company has been reducing holdings in major couriers like YTO Express, ZTO, Yunda, and fully divesting from Best Express. Meanwhile, Cainiao's domestic supply chain unit is being absorbed into Taobao-Tmall Group to strengthen instant retail capabilities. Despite the pullback, Alibaba maintains deepest ties with STO Express through extended purchase options, keeping potential control until 2028. The shift reflects shrinking courier profit margins, industry overcapacity, and Alibaba's focus on higher-growth overseas logistics and AI+cloud priorities over capital-intensive delivery networks.

title: 腾讯重仓一个IPO
content: Shenzhen-based Yuebao Intelligent (云豹智能), founded in 2020 by Stanford PhD Hsiao Qi-Yang, has filed for a ChiNext IPO to become China's first listed domestic DPU company. The firm develops high-performance data processing unit chips, with revenue surging to 370 million yuan in 2025 but still reporting net losses. Tencent is the largest shareholder with 19.78% stake after multiple funding rounds. The IPO follows fellow Greater Bay Area semiconductor firm Yuexin Semiconductor's successful listing approval, highlighting ChiNext's revised standards enabling unprofitable hard-tech companies to go public based on R&D and growth potential.

title: 锂电池行业更新7-11（多头崩溃）
content: The lithium battery sector experienced a severe decline, with analysts revising 2025 global battery shipment estimates upward from 2,600-2,800 GWh to 2,900-3,100 GWh, still below the projected 3,200-3,300 GWh actual figure. Detailed supply-demand analysis shows 2026 lithium carbonate supply at 205-210 million tons versus demand of 224 million tons, requiring full depletion of hidden inventories and reduction of visible inventories to 6-80,000 tons. For 2027, even conservative scenarios project 2350 GWh power batteries and 1600 GWh storage, totaling 4110 GWh and requiring approximately 275 million tons of lithium carbonate. With supply estimated at 260-280 million tons, the market faces persistent structural deficits rather than oversupply. Storage battery orders already extend 6-9 months, indicating strong demand. title: 广西六蓝水库溃口前后关键12小时：受困者与救助者 | 原文
content: On July 6, the Liulan Reservoir in Hengzhou, Guangxi breached, sending floodwaters surging downstream that destroyed numerous houses and farmland. Rescue and evacuation operations began immediately. Journalists documented the critical 12 hours before and after the breach, recording trapped residents, missing persons, rescuers, and those who saved themselves. After the floods receded on July 9, villages were left with knee-deep mud, dead livestock, and ongoing dangers including venomous snakes. Thousands of acres of jasmine fields were destroyed, yet villagers began rebuilding.

The discipline is grappling with the simultaneous pressures of an aging society, declining fertility rates, and artificial intelligence's impact on population studies.

title: 全网骂Claude变笨，Anthropic下场揭秘：坑你的不是模型
content: Anthropic clarified that Claude Code users often confuse Model selection with Effort settings. In March, lowering the default Effort from high to medium caused widespread complaints that Claude had "gotten dumber"—with task completion dropping 67%—though users blamed model degradation. Model determines capability ("brain"), while Effort determines thoroughness ("attitude"): reading files, running tests, verifying results. High Effort can make smaller models outperform larger ones on low Effort. Anthropic recommends checking context first, then deciding whether failures stem from insufficient capability (upgrade model) or insufficient effort (increase Effort). Effective AI programming now requires strategically scheduling models and effort levels rather than simply choosing the largest model.

title: GPT-5.6 出来后，我更关心的是：企业 AI 应用怎么快速接新模型？
content:
GPT-5.6's advances in layered architecture, ultra mode, subagents, and computer use signal a shift from single-query responses to complex task execution and agent collaboration. However, stronger model capabilities increase enterprises' need for a stable integration layer. Real projects use multiple models—GPT for reasoning, Claude for long-text analysis, plus open-source or local models—making individual API integrations unmaintainable.

Key enterprise challenges include unified multi-model management, rapid model switching, task-specific routing, token cost tracking, agent execution logging, RAG-workflow integration, permission handling, and minimizing code changes during upgrades.

ZGI, open-sourced two weeks ago with 200+ GitHub stars, addresses these as enterprise AI infrastructure rather than a chat wrapper. Its components are: knowledge base/RAG integration, visual workflow builders for prompts and tool chains, agent execution with audit logs, a model gateway unifying GPT/Claude/open-source/private models, and

title: AI批量造App，也在批量埋雷
content: AI-powered app creation tools like Moltbook and Lovable enable non-coders to build software rapidly, but security researchers discovered critical vulnerabilities exposing millions of API tokens, emails, and private messages due to misconfigured databases and authorization flaws. While these tools eliminate coding barriers, they do not address security responsibilities. A survey found ~5000 publicly accessible AI-generated apps leaking sensitive data, as privacy defaults often favor public access. Platforms marketing "zero-barrier" development deflect accountability by blaming users rather than implementing protective defaults. True developer competence now requires engineering responsibility: understanding data sensitivity, designing permissions, and maintaining safe deployment.

title: 纽约客｜我们说话越来越少，正在失去闲聊的能力 | 原文
content: Scientific studies show daily speech has declined 20% over two decades, with younger people dropping even more. Smartphones, self-checkout, and digital messaging are replacing casual in-person conversation. The author's experiment wearing a recorder revealed impatience and tenderness but almost no small talk. This reduction in fleeting verbal exchanges may increase loneliness and erode social trust.

title: 浅谈泡泡玛特
content: The author analyzes Pop Mart's long-term potential after observing a Shenzhen store and reading founder Wang Ning's book "Because of Uniqueness." Key arguments: Pop Mart should be viewed as a "retail entertainment" company delivering emotional value (satisfaction and presence) rather than merely a toy or blind-box business. Wang Ning's deep consumer understanding and operational capabilities form the core competitive moat. While domestic store expansion has limited upside, global expansion—where overseas stores outperform domestic ones—and business diversification through IP development, new categories, and cross-sector collaboration offer significant growth. The author projects potential market cap of HK$600 billion to HK$1 trillion within 5-8 years based on estimated profits of HK$30-50 billion.

title: 这个周末，科技投资人都得飞一趟成都
content:
Chengdu is emerging as a key hub for new energy investment. Four partners—including Chengdu state-owned platforms and Hangzhou-based Bicheng Energy—are launching a 1 billion yuan new energy M&A fund in Pengzhou city. The collaboration focuses on solar, energy storage, integrated charging systems, and urban microgrids, while establishing a smart energy management platform.

The partnership signals a shift in new energy asset operations: REITs and securitization tools are transforming previously illiquid infrastructure into tradable financial products. Chengdu attracts this investment through dual advantages: systematic capital deployment via local government funds and genuinely open application scenarios including industrial rooftops and urban microgrid opportunities.

content: Swiss forward Breel Embolo attempted to deceive the referee with a dive to draw a yellow card. After a VAR review, the ruse was uncovered and he was shown a red card instead. Embolo left the pitch in tears, holding his head in his hands, having turned a potential advantage for his team into a costly self-inflicted setback through his unsportsmanlike conduct.

title: 近百名玩家涌入具身数据 : 一年融资44.7亿，谁能真靠“卖数据”赚钱？
content: China's embodied intelligence data industry has attracted nearly 100 players, with 15 independent data service providers raising 4.47 billion yuan in the past year. Four main data collection approaches exist: real-device teleoperation, body-free capture, simulation, and internet video distillation. Cross-route strategies dominate, yet no single method meets all robot training needs. Annual industry capacity stands at 1.6-1.8 million hours, targeting 15-20x growth. Despite becoming an independent sector creating jobs and regional economic activity, the field remains early-stage: most companies are under one year old, nearly all at pre-A funding rounds, and none have proven profitability. Major investors remain cautious, with no institution making heavy bets.

After reaching a post-imperial peak in 2007—with median incomes surpassing Germany's—the UK experienced stagnation and disillusionment following the global financial crisis.

title: 股价破千背后的虚火，沐曦股份离盈亏平衡还有多远？
content: Mushi Co. (沐曦股份) reached a 400 billion RMB market cap in July 2026 after its stock briefly exceeded 1,000 RMB, but fundamentals remain weak. The company posted 1.64 billion RMB revenue in 2025 (up 121%) yet net losses of 789 million RMB, with cumulative unrecovered losses hitting 1.55 billion RMB. Q1 2026 still showed 99 million RMB losses. Despite strong GPU sales growth, massive R&D spending (1.03 billion RMB annually, 62% of revenue), negative operating cash flows, and high inventory and receivables risks threaten profitability. Mushi lags behind competitors like Huawei, Cambricon, and Hygon in securing major internet company orders and large-scale cluster deployments. Its 400-billion valuation lacks profit support, with price-to-book ratio over 30x versus industry averages. As domestic

title: grok-4.5 真的比 gpt-5.6 sol 好用吧
content: The author argues that Grok-4.5 outperforms GPT-5.6, citing the latter's slower speed, higher cost, and comparable intelligence levels. They also criticize GPT-5.6 for excessive autonomous behavior and mediocre aesthetic improvements.

title: 国际足联主席因凡蒂诺称世界杯考虑继续扩军至64支球队，如何看待他的这个表态？
content: 世界杯考虑继续扩军至64支球队，国际足联主席因凡蒂诺：每个国家都应该拥有参加世界杯的梦想；与特朗普保持着定期联系，几乎每天都沟通 北京时间7月12日，国际足联主席因凡蒂诺在接受采访时确认，国际足联将在2026美加墨世界杯结束后， 正式研究讨论世界杯进一步扩军至64支球队的议题。…

SK Hynix's chairman proposed Memory as a Service (MaaS) after a record $26.5 billion U.S. IPO. MaaS would shift memory sales from one-time chip purchases to subscription-based services, reducing customers' upfront costs and addressing AI data centers' memory mismatch problems. CXL technology enables this by creating shared memory pools across servers. However, challenges include strong coupling between HBM and Nvidia GPUs, requiring cooperation with cloud providers. While MaaS redistributes rather than eliminates cyclical risks, it could transform memory makers from hardware vendors into essential infrastructure suppliers.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 社交货币的全球性代际传承失衡
content: 在过去一个世纪里，人类消费社会中一直存在一种特殊的商品。它们并不主要满足物质需求，而是承担着表达身份、建立关系、维系圈层和交换信任的功能。社会学家常将这类现象概括为象征资本，而在日常语言中，可以把它们称为社交货币。 社交货币最大的特征，不是价格昂贵，而是只有当一代人与另一代人共同认…

title: 智谱，害怕成为下一个MiniMax
content: Zhipu AI founder Tang Jie issued a 4,000-word internal letter titled "The Giant Wave Has Arrived" shortly after competitor MiniMax's stock crashed post-lockup expiry. While Zhipu's coding-focused strategy drove its valuation to over one trillion HKD, Tang deliberately avoided celebrating this success. Instead, he emphasized autonomous agents, self-evolving AI, and AGI—technologies with no near-term revenue potential. Tang aims to prevent investors from applying SaaS valuation metrics to Zhipu, which devastated MiniMax when markets shifted to measuring ARR and user retention. By pivoting narratives before commercialization, Tang seeks to maintain "AGI company" pricing premium over "coding tool" multiples.

title: 专科大二，喜欢底层开发(?)，但有点迷茫想听听建议...
content: A vocational-college sophomore with a computer science scholarship describes their technical journey: early Android development, web development (Vue, Go, Next.js), then embedded systems (STM32, Raspberry Pi robot with ROS, SLAM hardware purchased). Currently learning C and Rust by building a GUI markdown editor and static site generator from scratch, using AI as a guided tutor. They question whether to pursue graduate school (408 exam), seek internship, or continue self-study toward their goal of building a compiler and RISC-V OS kernel. Strong English skills; feels lost about career direction despite enjoying coding.

title: 麦康奈尔缺席促使贝希尔再次要求提供疫情最新情况
content: Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear has renewed his demand for a health update on Senator Mitch McConnell, following McConnell's continued absence from public duties. The request comes as concerns persist about the Republican leader's condition after recent health incidents, including concussion and dehydration. Beshear, a Democrat, has previously pressed for transparency regarding McConnell's ability to serve. McConnell's office has provided limited information about his current status and expected return to Senate responsibilities.

title: 对话SK海力士崔泰源：AI时代的存储变局与展望
content: SK Hynix Chairman Chey Tae-won discussed the company's historic NYSE ADR listing, noting AI-driven exponential memory demand has structurally transformed the industry. Unlike past cycles tied to consumer electronics and population size, AI inference requires unlimited memory for KV caching, with customers wanting 5–6× capacity expansion despite planned doubling. Chey sees supply unable to catch demand until AGI integration occurs. He emphasized HBM, NAND for cold data, and future "Memory-as-a-Service" models. SK plans massive AI data center investments (15GW domestic, 5GW abroad) and broader AI stack development including robotics and healthcare, while acknowledging Chinese AI strategies focused on cost-efficient token production.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 景云鹏CapitalAI
